    • Full scRNA-seq Workflow

UMAP grid with optional composition trend panel

PlotDimPlots.Rd

Produces a UMAP grid where columns correspond to split.by levels and rows (optionally) to row.by levels. No empty panels: samples missing from a row are omitted rather than shown as blank bordered boxes. The optional composition trend panel (show_trend = TRUE) is placed to the left and stacked with the same ggarrange row structure so row heights always align.

Usage

PlotDimPlots(
  seurat_object,
  group.by = NULL,
  split.by = NULL,
  row.by = NULL,
  number_labels = FALSE,
  show_trend = FALSE,
  show_labels = FALSE,
  label.by = NULL,
  colors = NULL,
  reduction = "umap",
  pt.size = 0.1,
  label.size = 3,
  bar.width = 0.6,
  legendnrow = 2,
  legendtitle = NA,
  trend_width = 1,
  split.col.levels = NULL,
  width = NULL,
  height = NULL,
  join_plots = FALSE,
  join_nrow = NULL,
  join_ncol = NULL,
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = "",
  file_name = NULL,
  ...
)

PlotGridUMAP(
  seurat_object,
  group.by,
  split.by = NULL,
  row.by = NULL,
  colors = NULL,
  reduction = "umap",
  pt.size = 0.1,
  col.split = NULL,
  row.split = NULL
)

PlotTrendAndUMAP(
  seurat_object,
  group.by,
  split.by = NULL,
  row.by = NULL,
  colors = NULL,
  reduction = "umap",
  pt.size = 0.1,
  bar.width = 0.6,
  label.size = 3,
  legendnrow = 2,
  legendtitle = NA,
  trend_width = 1,
  legendmargin = NULL,
  plotwidths = NULL,
  split.col.levels = NULL,
  split.cols = NULL,
  split.rows = NULL
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object.

group.by

Character. Metadata column for point color.

split.by

Character. Metadata column for columns (samples/conditions).

row.by

Character or NULL. Metadata column for rows.

number_labels

Logical. When TRUE, prefix each legend entry and centroid label with a zero-padded index (e.g., "01. CellType"). Useful when there are many groups and alphanumeric ordering aids interpretation. Default FALSE.

show_trend

Logical. Add a stacked composition trend panel to the left. Default FALSE.

show_labels

Logical. Overlay numbered cluster labels. Default FALSE.

label.by

Character or NULL. Column for label centroids. NULL → group.by.

colors

Named color vector. NULL auto-resolves from PrepObject or Nour_pal.

reduction

Character. Reduction name (case-insensitive).

pt.size

Numeric. Point size. Default 0.1.

label.size

Numeric. Label text size. Default 3.

bar.width

Numeric. Bar width in the trend plot. Default 0.6.

legendnrow

Integer. Legend rows. Default 2.

legendtitle

Character or NA. Legend title.

trend_width

Numeric. Relative width of the trend panel vs. one UMAP column. Default 1.

split.col.levels

Character vector. Explicit ordering for split.by levels.

width

Numeric or NULL. Saved PDF width in inches. NULL (default) auto-sizes to fit the panel grid and the legend.

height

Numeric or NULL. Saved PDF height in inches. NULL (default) auto-sizes from the number of rows plus the legend strip.

join_plots

Logical. When group.by has more than one variable, combine the per-variable plots into a single figure / PDF instead of one file each. Default FALSE.

join_nrow, join_ncol

Integer or NULL. Grid layout for join_plots. NULL auto-arranges into a near-square grid.

output_dir

Character or NULL. Directory to save a PDF.

object_name

Character. Output file-name prefix.

subset_name

Character. Optional second prefix.

file_name

Character or NULL. Base name (no extension) for the saved PDF. NULL (default) auto-deduces from object_name, subset_name, and group.by.

...

Ignored (forward compatibility).

Value

A patchwork combined plot. With multiple group.by and join_plots = FALSE, a named list of plots (one per variable).

Functions

  • PlotGridUMAP(): Deprecated - use PlotDimPlots(show_trend=FALSE).

  • PlotTrendAndUMAP(): Deprecated - use PlotDimPlots(show_trend=TRUE).

On this page
